testcase.name: test_app_shell_titles_match_sidebar_routes

failure.message:
AssertionError: PageStack missing source for route audio_lab: ../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml assert ('../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' in 'import QtQuick
import QtQuick.Controls
import "../theme"
import "../components"

Item {
 id: root

 pro...gApp
 visible: pageLoader.status === Loader.Null && currentRoute !== "" && !loading
 z: -1
 }
}
' or 'audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' in 'import QtQuick
import QtQuick.Controls
import "../theme"
import "../components"

Item {
 id: root

 pro...gApp
 visible: pageLoader.status === Loader.Null && currentRoute !== "" && !loading
 z: -1
 }
}
') + where 'audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x7f928cca8c90>('../pages/', '') + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x7f928cca8c90> = '../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml'.replace

testcase.failure:
def test_app_shell_titles_match_sidebar_routes(): import re from ui_qml_bridge.route_registry import ROUTES sidebar = (QML_DIR / "shell" / "Sidebar.qml").read_text() sidebar_routes = set(re.findall(r'route: "(\w+)"', sidebar)) page_stack = (QML_DIR / "shell" / "PageStack.qml").read_text() for route in sidebar_routes: assert route in ROUTES, f"Sidebar route {route} not in RouteRegistry" info = ROUTES[route] > assert info["source"] in page_stack or info["source"].replace("../pages/", "") in page_stack, \ f"PageStack missing source for route {route}: {info['source']}" E AssertionError: PageStack missing source for route audio_lab: ../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml E assert ('../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' in 'import QtQuick
import QtQuick.Controls
import "../theme"
import "../components"

Item {
 id: root

 pro...gApp
 visible: pageLoader.status === Loader.Null && currentRoute !== "" && !loading
 z: -1
 }
}
' or 'audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' in 'import QtQuick
import QtQuick.Controls
import "../theme"
import "../components"

Item {
 id: root

 pro...gApp
 visible: pageLoader.status === Loader.Null && currentRoute !== "" && !loading
 z: -1
 }
}
') E + where 'audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml' = <built-in method replace of str object at 0x7f928cca8c90>('../pages/', '') E + where <built-in method replace of str object at 0x7f928cca8c90> = '../pages/audio_lab/AudioLabOverviewPage.qml'.replace

testcase.name: test_navigate_changes_route
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestNavigationBridge object at 0x7f928ca76410>
def test_navigate_changes_route(self): bridge = NavigationBridge() bridge.navigate("connections") > assert bridge.currentRoute == "connections" E AssertionError: assert 'home' == 'connections' E E - connections E + home
tests/qml/test_qml_bridges.py:232: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_navigate_settings_falls_to_placeholder

failure.message:
AssertionError: settings should be a valid route now assert 'home' == 'settings'
- settings + home

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestNavigationBridge object at 0x7f928ca7d150>
def test_navigate_settings_falls_to_placeholder(self): bridge = NavigationBridge() bridge.navigate("settings") > assert bridge.currentRoute == "settings", "settings should be a valid route now" E AssertionError: settings should be a valid route now E assert 'home' == 'settings' E E - settings E + home

testcase.name: test_navigation_bridge_accepts_metadata_inspector
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestMetadataBridge object at 0x7f92928a25d0>
def test_navigation_bridge_accepts_metadata_inspector(self): from ui_qml_bridge.navigation_bridge import NavigationBridge bridge = NavigationBridge() bridge.navigate("metadata_inspector") > assert bridge.currentRoute == "metadata_inspector" E AssertionError: assert 'placeholder' == 'metadata_inspector' E E - metadata_inspector E + placeholder

testcase.name: test_mix_detail_route_in_navigation

failure.message:

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestMixComponents object at 0x7f928cdb9b90>

self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestSettingsComponents object at 0x7f928cde95d0>

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_qml_bridges.TestGlobalSearchBridge object at 0x7f928cab9e90>
def test_global_search_no_db_returns_empty(self): from ui_qml_bridge.global_search_bridge import GlobalSearchBridge bridge = GlobalSearchBridge() result = bridge.search("test") > assert result.get("ok") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f928a3006c0>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7f928a3006c0> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE', 'error_code': 'SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE'}.get
